name: product-page-hero
title: Lumelle Product Detail Page Hero Section
description: Complete mobile PDP hero section from announcement pill through purchase buttons. Includes image carousel with thumbnail strip, product title with rating row, pull-quote review card, price block with discount badges, quantity stepper, and dual CTA buttons.

preview.reason: Imports app-specific providers (auth, cart, product data) that can't be mocked in isolation. Preserved as code-reference.
